title: 宝塚記念の後に・研磨せよ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week takes the lead and finishes with it.
Yet Grass Wonder quietly claims to have no
regrets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Scores of fans impacted by her running now have
high expectations for her next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa visits Grass Wonder after the race
and issues yet another challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with Silence Suzuka also scheduled to run,
the Mainichi Okan is shaping up to become an
intense race.
